---
title: "Coding Syntax"
author: 
  - name: Lindsay Hayes
    url: https://lindsaynhayes.github.io
    affiliation: Department of Cell Biology, OUHC
date: 2026-07-10
draft: false
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Pre-lecture activities

Familiarize yourself with the logic behind Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) by reading the following [pre-reading materials](/readings/index_R03.qmd):

[What is EDA?](https://querio.ai/blogs/what-is-exploratory-data-analysis)

[*Exploratory Data Analysis* in R for Data Science](https://r4ds.had.co.nz/exploratory-data-analysis.html)

# Lecture

## Learning objectives

::: callout-note
### Learning objectives

**At the end of class you will be able to:**

- Define EDA
- State the purpose of EDA
- Describe the goals and procedures underlying EDA
:::

## Slides

- [Lecture 03: Syntax](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1-HQR7r_EBE_R-QIRumYmWX30fQr1rH1uUq_KJ9xdyYQ/edit?usp=sharing)

- [In-Class Activity](/activities/classwork03/classwork_L03.qmd)

# Post-lecture Practice

## Homework

To get more practice working with data in R complete the following homework. You will be asked to **upload your activities for a course grade**: [Assignment 1](https://lindsaynhayes.github.io/introR2025/projects/index_A01.html){target="_blank"}
